seo.metaTitle: Social Media Management | White-Label for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: AI-assisted content creation and scheduling, including images and video — keep SMB audiences active and growing under your brand.

hero.headline: AI-Assisted Posting — Always On Under Your Brand
hero.subheadline: SMBs know they need social presence but lack time and creative resources. Give them a guided, white-label workspace to plan, create, and publish.
hero.description: Combine AI drafts, scheduling, and multi-network publishing so your customers stay consistent — while you retain the commercial relationship and brand experience.

items.title: Create faster
items.body: AI-assisted captions, ideas, and variants tuned for each network.

items.title: Stay on schedule
items.body: Calendar views, approvals, and publishing windows that fit their team.

items.title: Grow engagement
items.body: Video and image workflows that keep feeds fresh without a full creative team.

features.heading: Social That Scales for SMBs
features.intro: Operational simplicity for partners; polished output for end customers.

cards.title: AI content assistance
cards.body: Drafts, hashtags, and variants aligned to brand tone.

cards.title: Scheduling & queues
cards.body: Plan weeks ahead with drag-and-drop calendars.

cards.title: Creative tools
cards.body: Templates and assets for quick, on-brand visuals.

cards.title: Roles & approvals
cards.body: Agency or multi-user workflows without losing control.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Recurring Revenue, Low Churn
partnerAdvantage.intro: Social is never “done” — it’s a natural subscription attach to websites, listings, and ads.

items.title: Bundle with web & SEO
items.body: One narrative from site to search to social.

items.title: Upsell creative services
items.body: Start with software; add done-for-you tiers where needed.

items.title: Brand-safe defaults
items.body: Guardrails and templates reduce support load.

lifecycleFit.heading: Where Social Sits in the Lifecycle
lifecycleFit.intro: After a business is found online, social keeps the conversation going and feeds other channels.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Logo and email set the tone.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Websites and hosting anchor the hub.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Social, email marketing, and ads compound growth.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position social as the always-on layer that supports reputation, SEO signals, and campaign creative — sold as a subscription alongside your core stack.

cta.headline: Ready to Launch Social Under Your Brand?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to package AI-assisted social for your SMB base.
